det_check_template:
proof fn det_merge_4k_pages_to_2m_page(target_page_idx: usize, page_perms: Tracked<Map<usize, PagePerm4k>>, r1: Tracked<PagePerm2m>, r2: Tracked<PagePerm2m>)
    requires (target_page_idx + 512 <= NUM_PAGES), (forall|i:usize|
            #![auto]
            0<=i<512 
            ==>
            page_perms@.dom().contains(i)
            &&
            page_perms@[i].is_init()
            &&
            page_perms@[i].addr() == page_index2page_ptr((target_page_idx + i) as usize)),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (r1@.is_init())
            &&& (r1@.addr() == page_index2page_ptr(target_page_idx))
            &&& (r2@.is_init())
            &&& (r2@.addr() == page_index2page_ptr(target_page_idx))
        }) ==> det_merge_4k_pages_to_2m_page_equal(r1, r2),
{
{ASSUMES}}
